description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow complex featuring multiple interconnected structures with pitched dark roofs and light-colored exterior walls. The property includes expansive green lawns, a swimming pool, a hot tub, and several outdoor lounging areas with deck chairs and patio furniture. There are visible garages, a greenhouse, and a fenced perimeter, suggesting a private and secure residential environment. The windows are large and numerous, providing ample natural light, and the arrangement of the buildings creates semi-private courtyards and open spaces. Trees and shrubs are strategically placed for landscaping, and paved walkways connect the various sections. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A modern, multi-structure bungalow with pitched roofs, large windows, green lawns, a pool, and outdoor living spaces, all enclosed by fencing.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main building, large green lawn, pool area, and a secondary structure with a hot tub and patio furniture.
description_view_1: This angle shows the front facades, garages, and the main entrance, as well as the division between the two main building sections.
description_view_2: From the rear, the pool, greenhouse, and extensive backyard are visible, along with the connecting walkways and fencing.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the garages, driveway, and the arrangement of the buildings around the central green space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and multiple orientations
